one_time_description: Gain on restructuring of Nation business enterprises and partnerships
economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises and partnerships including Songhees Development Corporation, Songhees Development Limited Partnership, Seed & Stone Victoria Limited Partnership, Skungeenes Holdings Limited Liability Partnership, S&S Victoria Limited Partnership, 1185869 B.C. Ltd., 1255063 B.C. Ltd. Restructuring occurred during 2021 year whereby some entities moved from consolidation to modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year 2021. Significant restructuring occurred whereby Songhees Development Corporation and Songhees Development Limited Partnership were moved from consolidation to modified equity method, generating a $5,468,252 gain on restructuring which significantly inflated annual surplus. Three entities consolidated (Songhees James Bay Village Trust, Songhees Cadboro Bay Trust, Songhees Cadboro Bay Settlement Minors Trust). Six entities accounted for by modified equity method. Advances to related Nation entities of $12,833,684 appeared for first time in 2021 (zero in 2020) due to restructuring. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $5,033,003 + Province of BC $814,012 + FNHA $681,668 + CMHC $37631 + Other government funding $808,639 = $7,374,953. osr = $12,926,555 - $7,374,953 = $5,551,602 (includes FNGST $1,712,039, property tax $888,763, lease income $846,328, rental income $516,906, gaming $404,586, investment income $363,893, interest income $350,667, other income $626,600, and loss from business enterprises -$158,180). COVID-19 noted as significant event. Auditor office located in Nanaimo, BC.
